bird.name: Sira barbet
bird.summary: The Sirá barbet (Capito fitzpatricki) is a bird in the family Capitonidae, the New World barbets. It is endemic to the Cerros del Sira of e…

locations.name: El Sira Communal Reserve
locations.summary: El Sira Communal Reserve (Spanish: Reserva Comunal El Sira) is a protected area in Peru created to preserve the biodive…

relations.subject: Sira barbet
relations.evidence: Eight specimens were collected from the upper Río Shinipo and Río Tzipani valleys , and a further two at Quebrada Quirapokiari in July 2011. Its range is sympatric and syntopic with that of the gilded barbet, and coincides with the boundary and sections of the Sira Communal Reserve. It primarily inhabits the highest stratum of tall (up to ) montane forest with arboreal epiphytes and moss above a sparsely vegetated understory
